text:
あたしって、ハンターのセンスが
ないのかなぁ……

なんて思ったりもしたけど
訓練しなきゃセンスも開花しないよね。

実はゼノも、あたしの知らないところで
猛特訓してたのかもしれないし
あたしも頑張ってみようと思うんだ。

だから、この特訓のこと
いつかゼノに会っても内緒だ

You know, sometimes I'm not all that sure I'm
cut out to be a Hunter...

I assumed that might be something that just
sort of comes with time.

I guess even Zeno might've had to push
himself through boot camp to get to where
he was. I probably just haven't put in enough
effort yet.

Let's just keep all this training between us
whenever we finally get to see him again
though, okay?
